summary: Approval Flow v140 - All 8 CRITICAL tests PASSED. POST /api/admin/payments/{proof_id}/approve creates orders with approved_by='Konekt Administrator' (real admin name from JWT), approved_at=valid ISO timestamp. Vendor orders created with correct vendor_id matching partner login. Vendor privacy protected (no customer_name/phone/email exposed). Admin order detail shows payer_name separate from customer_name. Customer order drawer shows real sales contact (Janeth Msuya, +255710000001, janeth.sales@konekt.demo).
seed_data_creation: Approved payment proof 8a216c50-e5f2-4e86-9202-3df950940979, created order KON-ORD-20260330081904
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRITICAL approval flow tests passing. LiveCommerceService.approve_payment_proof() correctly populates: approved_by='Konekt Administrator' (real admin name from JWT via admin_facade_routes.py), approved_at=valid ISO timestamp. Vendor orders created with vendor_id matching partner's login id (69b827eae21f56c57362c6b7). Vendor privacy protected - /api/vendor/orders does NOT expose customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email. Admin orders table shows separate Customer and Payer columns. Customer order drawer shows real sales contact with Call and Email buttons.

CRITICAL-1_approved_by_real_name.details: Order created with approved_by='Konekt Administrator' (real admin name from JWT, NOT 'admin' or 'finance'), approved_at='2026-03-30T08:19:04.551505+00:00' (valid ISO)

CRITICAL-2_assigned_vendor_id.details: Order has assigned_vendor_id field. Vendor_ids resolved from product catalog via LiveCommerceService.

CRITICAL-3_vendor_order_vendor_id.details: Vendor orders created with vendor_id matching partner's login id. VO-KON-ORD-20260330081615-1 has vendor_id=69b827eae21f56c57362c6b7

CRITICAL-4_vendor_sees_order.details: Vendor at /api/vendor/orders sees 6 orders including VO-KON-ORD-20260330081615-1 with base_price=75000, status=assigned

CRITICAL-5_vendor_privacy.details: Vendor orders do NOT contain customer_name, customer_phone, customer_email. Table columns: Date, Vendor Order No, Source Type, Base Price, Status, Priority

CRITICAL-6_admin_order_detail.details: Admin order detail shows payer_name='Don' (from proof), customer_name='Demo Customer' (separate), approved_by='Konekt Administrator', approved_at=valid ISO

CRITICAL-7_vendor_name_resolved.details: Admin order detail shows vendor_orders with vendor_name='John Demo' resolved from partner_users.full_name

CRITICAL-8_customer_sales_contact.details: Customer order drawer shows real sales contact: Janeth Msuya, +255710000001, janeth.sales@konekt.demo with Call and Email buttons

SEPARATION_payer_vs_customer.details: Admin orders table shows separate Customer and Payer columns. Example: Customer='Demo Customer', Payer='Don'

screenshots: .screenshots/admin_orders_v140.png - Admin orders table with Customer, Payer, Approved By columns showing 'Konekt Administrator'
.screenshots/vendor_orders_v140.png - Vendor orders table with NO Customer column (privacy protected), shows VO-KON-ORD-20260330081615-1
.screenshots/customer_order_drawer_v140.png - Customer order drawer with real sales contact (Janeth Msuya, +255710000001)
